narrative:
Bloomfield Twp township has 719 registered voters, with 60.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.6 percentage points.
